button.t-attf-class: bn-stage-card bn-stage-card--fill bn-stage-card--pod bn-stage-card--pod-{{ p.document_type }} {{ p.pod_status === 'pending' ? 'bn-stage-card--pod-pending' : 'bn-stage-card--pod-done' }} {{ p.billable ? 'bn-stage-card--billable' : '' }} {{ !p.count ? 'bn-stage-card--empty' : '' }}

span.t-out: fmtInt(p.count) + ' of ' + fmtInt(p.doc_total) + ' at this stage'

button.t-attf-class: bn-stage-card bn-stage-card--fill bn-stage-card--charge bn-stage-card--charge-{{ c.key }} bn-charge-card {{ chargeCompact ? 'bn-stage-card--compact' : '' }} {{ !c.count ? 'bn-stage-card--empty' : '' }}

button.title: Create consolidated invoice for all unbilled charges
Create consolidated invoice for all unbilled charges

div.span: Click a branch to filter cases
Click a location to filter cases

t.t-value: state.data?.scope_label || 'Cases assigned to you — pipeline, hearings, and billing'
state.data?.scope_label || 'Cases assigned to you — hearings, awards, and invoices'
